name: Houdini Action: Import FBX
description: Creates a Houdini action that imports an .fbx file. When context is /obj, uses hou.hipFile.importFBX() to build the /obj network. When context is /stage, creates an FBX LOP. Chain via actions_in/actions_out into a Houdini Headless node.
python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    actions_in = inputs.get('actions_in') or []
    if not isinstance(actions_in, list):
        actions_in = [actions_in]
    fbx_path = inputs.get('fbx_path') or self.get_parameter('fbx_path', '')
    context = inputs.get('context') or self.get_parameter('context', '/obj')
    action = {'type': 'import_fbx', 'fbx_path': fbx_path, 'context': context}
    actions_out = list(actions_in) + [action]
    self.log_info(f'Added import_fbx action -> {fbx_path} ({context})')
    await self.set_output('actions_out', actions_out)
    await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    return {'actions_out': actions_out}
